name: Do I need separate pages for each city I serve, like Salt Lake City and Denver?
description: Separate pages can help if each one is truly useful and unique. They should describe real service areas, not duplicate the same text.

mainEntity.name: Do I need separate pages for each city I serve, like Salt Lake City and Denver?

acceptedAnswer.text: For local businesses in Salt Lake City or Denver, service-area pages can help if they reflect genuine coverage and not copied text. Each location page should give a clear answer about what you do, where you do it, and how quickly customers can reach you.
acceptedAnswer.description: Separate pages can help if each one is truly useful and unique. They should describe real service areas, not duplicate the same text.
